title: Ship Permission Presets
description: Schema for .ship/permissions.jsonc — named permission presets on a strict-to-loose continuum. Referenced by agent configs via "permissions": { "preset": "<name>" }.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

PermissionPreset.description: A named permission preset. Defines tool access rules and a default permission mode.

default_mode.description: Default permission mode for agents using this preset. Controls how much autonomy the agent has: plan (read-only), default (ask for writes), acceptEdits (auto-approve edits), dontAsk (fully autonomous), bypassPermissions (no restrictions).

tools_allow.description: Tool patterns to allow. Supports glob patterns. Examples: Read, Bash(*), mcp__ship__*, Bash(ship *).

tools_deny.description: Tool patterns to deny. Takes precedence over tools_allow. Examples: Bash(rm -rf *), Bash(git push --force*).

tools_ask.description: Tool patterns requiring user confirmation. Applied before tools_allow but after tools_deny.
